description: Create a Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID) for a Steam Heater Control Loop based on the specifications in '~/Desktop/pid_specs.txt'. The diagram must include a Heat Exchanger (Tag: HX-200), a Temperature Transmitter (Tag: TT-201) on the outlet, a Temperature Indicator Controller (Tag: TIC-201), and a Control Valve (Tag: TV-201) on the steam inlet, connected by process lines to form a feedback control loop. Label all components with their Tag Numbers. Save the source file to '~/Desktop/heat_exchanger_pid.drawio' and export a PNG to '~/Desktop/heat_exchanger_pid.png'.
